name: Post-Apocalyptic Caravan
description: Preset Post-Apocalyptic Caravan with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: A fragile caravan carries the only cure across wastelands.
text_areas.setting: Ruined highways, scavenger enclaves, and radioactive dead zones.
text_areas.main_objective: Escort the caravan and keep fragile alliances intact.
text_areas.stakes: Without delivery, a survivor network collapses to plague and raiders.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
